link.title: emagine | experience expertise

meta.name: description
meta.content: emagine is a high-end business, engineering & IT consultancy. Enabled by a network of consultants, we deliver results through tailored top consulting services.
emagine is a high-end business, engineering & IT consultancy. Enabled by a network of consultants, we deliver results through tailored top consulting services.

div.div: Welcome to all our new partners!

p.h6: We're proud to welcome Gentis in Luxembourg, Belgium and France, and Waada the Movement in the Netherlands to the emagine group. These partnerships mark another step forward in expanding our European presence and delivering local excellence on a global scale.

To our new colleagues, consultants, clients, and partners: we're thrilled to have you on board. Together, we look forward to advancing our shared goals, broadening our capabilities, and delivering exceptional value to the industries we serve.
Further details are available in our press releases, outlining how these partnerships support emagine's long-term strategic vision.

a.span: Read more about the merge with Waada the Movement
Read more about the merge with Gentis

div.p: By taking a holistic perspective to deliver quality services and expertise, we utilize a global workforce to guarantee the flexibility and scalability needed to succeed in a constantly changing digital reality. We call it bestshoring.

Onsite
On-premises delivery all over Europe

Nearshore
Development centres in Poland and Portugal

Remote
Utilizing a global workforce of IT experts

section.class: feed clearfix

div.h3: Report: Insights from a consulting workforce

div.p: The data is clear: consulting has matured into a safe, viable, and future‑proof career path. Download our report and unlock the insights behind Europe’s most resilient talent pool.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.h3: Ebook: When IT and OT meet

div.p: Explore the convergence of IT and Operational Technology (OT), from the risks and rewards of integration to four core themes that are decisive in delivering impact for critical infrastructure.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Learn how to map your organisation’s cloud dependencies, spot the hidden risks, and build a structured fallback plan if access is lost or compromised.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Download the ebook: From Fragmentation to Efficiency: Transforming Europe’s Post‑trade Ecosystem for T+1 Settlement.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Explore how businesses can strike a balance between embracing AI’s immense potential and maintaining the human touch that fosters trust and connection.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Explore the intersection of AI and project management, tracing its roots from traditional methods to the cutting-edge applications reshaping the industry today.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.h3: Ebook: How to scale up with remote developers

div.p: Learn how to capitalize on a growing external IT workforce and get the most out of external IT talent with this free ebook.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Break the backlog bubble and transcend administrative tasks, so that you can ultimately make a real impact with your product ownership.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: This ebook introduces the concept of hybrid project management, combining the structure of waterfall methods and agile principles.

section.class: feed clearfix

img.alt: Spread of ebook The future of agile

div.p: Get a free copy of our E-book: Read why Agile in 2023 faces a crucial crossing where organizations must revise their approach to the methodology and its organization. Understand how Agile is being applied across different cultures and business environments

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Get free copy of our Ebook: The purpose of this e-book is to contribute to a better understanding of the importance of steering committees, their area of work, and which elements are important to them.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Get free copy of our Ebook: Our transformation model revolves around people. Both those who are affected and those who lead the transformation. This means that we not only illuminate the strategic focus areas in a transformation, but we also actively work on how you concretely engage the employees and leaders involved.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.h3: Ebook: The fast forward scrum master

div.p: Get free copy of our Ebook: The fast forward scrum master. A coaching tool that helps Scrum Masters become successful in their roles fast, without having to learn everything the hard way.

section.class: feed clearfix

div.p: Get our ultimate guide on how your IT organization can tap into Polish IT talent. Download the e-book and read condensed knowledge, facts and cases about Nearshoring based on our 12 years experience. Download now and get it free.

section.class: fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-bz8t59nghuvx fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-animation fl-fade-in nearshoring-services

div.p: At emagine, we cultivate a culture of openness and integrity to foster meaningful and strong relationships with clients and consultants.

div.class: fl-col fl-node-wl0boy5dta8i fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small fl-col-small-full-width fl-col-small-custom-width

div.p: Our ability to listen, understand and adapt to our clients' and consultants' unique challenges and priorities enables us to create real impact and value, ultimately leading to meaningful partnerships.

h3.span: We are emagine, and we hear you.
